title: Stainless Steel Suction Cup Hooks Set of 2, No Hole Required, For Bathroom and Kitchen, Christmas
features: [High quality material] The No Punch bathroom hooks are made of stainless steel, which is not easy to corrode and also has the function of waterproof, it is a durable product.
[Novel Design] These stainless steel sucker hooks are equipped with suction cups, which can be attached to a smooth, flat and dry tiled wall and will not cause any damage to the wall.

[Widely used]Stainless steel suction cup hooks are suitable for a variety of smooth, flat, non-porous surfaces such as mirrors, glass and tile walls, etc.; can be used not only in the bathroom to hang bathroom utensils, but also in the kitchen to hang kitchen utensils.
[Reusable]Stainless steel hooks can be disassembled at any time, just clean the suction cups behind the hooks and dry them to be reused.

[Easy installation]The installation process of the suction cup hook does not require the use of other tools, follow the steps of the suction cup hook air out, simply rotate the suction cup to lock the vacuum state.
description: Product Description Product Specification Material: stainless steel Load capacity: 6kg Silver: suction cup hook x 2 Black: suction cups x 4 Product Features Made of stainless steel material which is waterproof and prevents rust. No need to drill holes or use other tools to install the product. The base of the suction cup hook has strong adsorption force when it is in the vacuum state, and has a certain load-bearing function. The suction cup hooks will not damage the wall after disassembly, just wash the suction cups and dry them for reuse. Installation Steps Step 1 Step 2 Step 3 Step 4 Suitable for clean, smooth, dry and non-porous surfaces: glass, smooth metal surfaces, smooth tiles Not suitable for uneven surfaces: lime walls, wallpaper, paint Walls, concrete surfaces
